economic_notes: Band holds 100% of K'ul Management Group Ltd (KMGLTD) which controls multiple LPs and corporations including aggregates, forestry, construction, and residential development. Band holds 20% of Skaha Hills Limited Partnership. COVID-19 additional funding received including member distribution. Royalties received from KMGLTD of $274,644.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Three consolidated subsidiaries: PIB, PIBULP, ONTEH. Two GBEs on modified equity basis: KMGLTD (100% owned, $1.975M loss) and Skaha Hills LP (20% owned, $257K income). Comparative figures restated due to $148,037 of revenues incorrectly included in prior year. Loan guarantees totalling over $12M for related entities. Pension plan contributions $282,563. No schedule of remuneration provided. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + FNHA + FNESC + OTDC + Province of BC + BC First Nations Gaming = $10,003,048 + $205,847 + $1,347,939 + $910,694 + $123,638 + $3,025,080 + $533,489 = $16,149,735; OSR = $21,862,669 - $16,149,735 = $5,712,934. Wages in segmented schedule show $7,559,743 vs expenditures by object showing $7,206,053 — used object classification figure. expenses_salaries_total uses the expenditures by object figure. ONTEH included as consolidated entity (transition house operation).
